chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1065 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 29.08.2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Syed Zahid Shah, Auditor, District Accounts Office, Naushahro Feroze. >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG Sindh has filed compliance report and submits that an amount of Rs.5009,325/- has been paid to the petitioner through Cheque No.4944733 and original service book to the petitioner enabling him to submit a bill accordingly for leave encashment, which shall be paid to him as soon as the bill is submitted. Petition is accordingly disposed of; however, if the payments are not made the petitioner may make an application to this Court for notice. Judge Judge ARBROHI
